faq.question: How much does window replacement cost in San Leandro?
faq.answer: San Leandro homeowners typically invest $5,000 to $11,000 for a full window replacement project covering 10–15 windows. This East Bay city's 1940s–1960s housing stock offers efficient standard-size replacement projects that deliver clear comfort and energy savings from day one. Single window installation starts at approximately $460.

faq.question: Do I need a permit for window replacement in San Leandro?
faq.answer: Yes. San Leandro requires a building permit for window replacements. Our team handles all permit applications with the City of San Leandro Building & Safety Division on your behalf.

faq.question: Which window brands does Deluxe Windows install in San Leandro?
faq.answer: For San Leandro's established East Bay market, we most frequently install Milgard Tuscany vinyl for its competitive pricing and strong warranty, Simonton for budget-conscious projects, and Milgard Ultra fiberglass for homes near the Bay Marina requiring superior moisture resistance.

faq.question: Does Deluxe Windows serve all San Leandro neighborhoods?
faq.answer: Yes — we serve all San Leandro neighborhoods including Estudillo Estates, Washington Manor, Bay O'Vista, and Broadmoor. Zip codes: 94577, 94578, 94579.
